subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto those who have held fast to the mighty Cord of God and have clung to the hem of the robe of their Lord, the All-Forgiving, the Most Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للذین تمسکوا بحبل الله المتین و تشبثوا باذیال ردآء ربهم الغفور الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @proclamation to Jews, @personal instructions, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
